hints.generalRules: These values apply by default when a shop has no specific rule.
hints.shopRules: Adapt selected behavior for a specific shop.
hints.paymentMethods: Choose payment methods available for sales and royalty payments.
hints.newPaymentMethod: Only add methods that shops actually accept.
hints.barcodeRules: Define the barcode format used for checkout, stock and inventory scanning.
hints.newBarcodeRule: Use a format compatible with scanners and label printing.
hints.profilesPermissions: Profiles determine visible menus and authorized actions.
hints.newProfile: Create a clear role, then select its allowed actions.
hints.userAssignments: Assign a user role for a shop and validity period.
hints.newShop: Create the point of sale, then assign a tenant from the shop list.
hints.newShopUser: The account is created and assigned to a shop with the selected role.
hints.newAssignment: A user can have different permissions depending on the shop.

empty.noAvailableShop: No shop is available for your current profile.

readOnly.paymentMethods: You have read-only access to payment methods.
readOnly.barcodeRules: You have read-only access to barcode settings.
readOnly.profiles: You can view profiles but cannot change permissions.
readOnly.users: You can view assignments but cannot create users.
readOnly.assignments: You can view assignments but cannot create them.

help.shopName: Trading name used in sales and reports.
help.location: Specify the terminal, hall, gate or operating area.
help.maliPhone: Optional. 8 digits, without spaces or country code.
help.managerScope: Managers only see shops within their scope.
help.role: The role determines visible menus and authorized actions.
help.userEmail: Used for activation and password recovery.

validation.maliPhone: A Mali phone number must contain exactly 8 digits.

defaultCurrency.label: Default currency
defaultCurrency.description: Currency used by default for monetary amounts.

defaultRoyaltyRate.label: Default royalty rate
defaultRoyaltyRate.description: Rate used when no more specific rule exists.

defaultStockAlert.label: Stock alert threshold
defaultStockAlert.description: Default stock threshold that triggers an alert.

passengerReferenceRequired.label: Passenger reference required
passengerReferenceRequired.description: Require a passenger reference during sales.

boardingPassRequired.label: Boarding pass required
boardingPassRequired.description: Require a boarding pass during sales.

shopRoyaltyRate.label: Shop royalty rate
shopRoyaltyRate.description: Royalty rate specific to the shop.

shopStockAlert.label: Shop stock alert threshold
shopStockAlert.description: Stock threshold specific to the shop.

messages.loadFailed: The settings center could not be loaded.
messages.globalParameterUpdateFailed: The global parameter could not be updated.
messages.shopParameterUpdateFailed: The shop parameter could not be updated.
messages.paymentLabelRequired: The payment method label is required.
messages.paymentModeCreateFailed: The payment method could not be added.
messages.barcodeRuleCreateFailed: The barcode rule could not be added.
messages.profileCreateFailed: The profile could not be created.
messages.maliPhoneInvalid: A Mali phone number must contain exactly 8 digits.
messages.shopCreateFailed: The shop could not be created.
messages.shopUserRequired: The shop, role, login and email are required.
messages.shopUserCreateFailed: The shop user could not be created.
messages.assignmentRequired: The user, shop and profile are required.
messages.assignmentCreateFailed: The assignment could not be created.
messages.activeStatusUpdateFailed: The active status could not be updated.
messages.assignmentUpdateFailed: The assignment could not be updated.
